subject: english
learning_objectives: Read and understand a passage on law enforcement
Identify Nigeria’s role in drug trafficking control

sections.heading: Passage
sections.content: The passage centres on the attempts by the Nigeria Government to curb drug trafficking in the country. Nigeria’s geographical position gives it the unfortunate distinction of being the natural hub for drug trafficking to and from the Americas, to Europe and across Africa. The United State Government signed an executive agreement on procedures for mutual assistance in law enforcement matters in November 1987. Some  success  have been recorded but much still remains to b done.
